'''Govia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Govia system/Legends|Govia system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Govian]] [[Species/Legends|species]].
